SQLLite.SQL: SELECT AT.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE As "Value", AT.ADDRESS_TYPE_DESCRIPTION As "Description" FROM ADDRESS_TYPES AT WHERE ( AT.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'WELSH_OFFICE' OR AT.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'OFFICE' OR AT.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'COURTHOUSE' ) ORDER BY AT.ADDRESS_TYPE_DESCRIPTION

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper edsAdmin ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2 ccbcTape admin
